query: What is the minimum Average Quarterly Balance required to qualify for Novus Plus?
expected_answer: Maintain AQB of ₹1,00,000 (₹1 lakh) or more across savings + FD accounts for the full quarter.

query: How does a customer upgrade from Standard to Novus Plus?
expected_answer: Automatic at next quarter review if AQB criterion is met for 2 consecutive quarters.

query: What happens if my AQB drops below ₹75,000 for two consecutive quarters while I am in Novus Plus?
What benefits do Novus Elite members receive that Standard members do not?
expected_answer: Dedicated Relationship Manager, unlimited free NEFT/RTGS, 4 airport lounge visits/year, priority review for loan return windows, and 0% forex cross-currency charge.

query: When will a customer be notified about a potential downgrade in membership tier?
expected_answer: Customers receive SMS/email 30 days before potential downgrade.

query: I've been a Novus Plus member but my AQB dropped below ₹75,000 for two quarters. Why wasn't I warned about my downgrade to Standard?
expected_answer: Customers receive SMS/email 30 days before potential downgrade.

query: I thought I would be upgraded to Novus Elite automatically, but I didn't receive any information. What are the criteria for that upgrade?
expected_answer: Maintain AQB of ₹5,00,000 or more, OR maintain investments of ₹10,00,000 or more.

query: Why do I have to pay an account maintenance fee if I'm on the Standard tier?
expected_answer: Account maintenance fee for Standard is ₹299/year.

query: I was expecting a Relationship Manager after my upgrade to Novus Elite, but it's been over 5 working days. What's going on?
expected_answer: Assigned within 5 working days of Elite upgrade.

query: After my recent downgrade to Standard, I'm concerned about my debit card replacement fees. How much will I have to pay now?
expected_answer: Debit card replacement fee for Standard is ₹150.

query: What is the penalty if I fall below the AQB required for Novus Plus?
expected_answer: If AQB drops below ₹75,000 for 2 consecutive quarters, you will be reverted to Standard with 30-day notice.

query: Can I get a dedicated relationship manager if my average balance is ₹1 lakh?
expected_answer: No, a dedicated relationship manager is only available for Novus Elite members.

query: How many free NEFT/RTGS transactions do I get with the Standard membership?
expected_answer: NEFT/RTGS charges are per schedule in the Standard membership.

query: If I maintain ₹5,00,000 in my savings account for a quarter, will I be upgraded to Novus Elite immediately?
expected_answer: You will be upgraded automatically at the next quarter review if the eligibility criterion is met.

query: Does Novus Elite offer any airport lounge access?
expected_answer: Yes, Novus Elite offers 4 visits/year to partner domestic airport lounges.
